news.summary: In Hong Kong on July 3, 2025, Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) disclosed the initiation of the Phase Ia clinical trial for AK146D1, a bispecific Antibody-Drug Conjugate (ADC) aimed at Trop2 and Nectin4, with the enrollment of the inaugural patient. AK146D1 marks a significant development for Akeso in advancing its pharmaceutical portfolio.
news.headline: Akeso's new bispecific ADC (Trop2/Nectin4) begins clinical trials, setting the pace for 'IO+ADC' 2.0 approach. Patient enrollment underway for Phase Ia trial of AK146D1.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on July 3, 2025, the Volvo Group announced that their second quarter 2025 report is scheduled for release on July 17 at 7:20 a.m. CEST. A conference call will be held for press and analysts commencing at 9:00 a.m. CEST. The report will be available online with a presentation to follow.
news.headline: Volvo Group's Q2 2025 report to be released on July 17 at 7:20 a.m. CEST, with a conference call for press and analysts at 9:00 a.m. CEST.

news.summary: A new E-Mobility Attractiveness Index for 2025, presented by BearingPoint and the Handelsblatt Research Institute, analyzes the competitiveness of battery electric vehicles (BEVs) across major auto markets: China, France, Germany, and the US. With BEVs reaching similar levels of technological maturity globally, the index evaluates consumer perceptions and purchasing influences. This effort marks the first time these four markets have been compared in this context. The study aims to provide insights into market attractiveness and reveals crucial factors shaping consumer preferences in the evolving BEV landscape.
news.headline: Global study by BearingPoint & HRI shows electric vehicles' maturity, with key factors shaping market - infrastructure, price, and trust. New E-Mobility Attractiveness Index compares major markets: China, France, Germany, and US.
AIRASIA IS IN TALKS WITH AIRBUS TO CONVERT SOME EXISTING NARROW-BODY ORDERS INTO LONG-RANGE A321XLR ORDERS - SOURCES

news.summary: A cutting-edge coding agent called DeepSWE-Preview has achieved significant success in open-source AI by achieving a notable 59% success rate on the SWE-Bench-Verified dataset. This demonstrates state-of-the-art performance through the utilization of reinforcement learning techniques.
news.headline: DeepSWE-Preview, a coding agent, achieves 59% success on SWE-Bench-Verified, through open-source AI and reinforcement learning.

news.summary: Futarchy introduces a governance model for DAOs that is market-based, aiming to align economic incentives and decision-making processes for the early success of crypto projects. This approach seeks to leverage market forces to optimize decision-making within decentralized autonomous organizations, boosting their effectiveness. By implementing this model, DAOs can potentially benefit from improved decision-making and increased chances of success in the ever-evolving crypto landscape.
news.headline: Futarchy improves governance in early-stage crypto projects with market-based models. Enhances project success. Learn more.

news.summary: A special 4th of July sale is being hosted by Gala Games, offering unique NFTs that celebrate the American spirit. The limited-time event presents rare digital treasures for collectors to enjoy.
news.headline: Exclusive 4th of July NFT Sale by Gala Games offers unique American-themed NFTs for collectors. Limited-time event with rare digital treasures.

news.summary: Tezos introduces Jstz, a new platform that allows developers to create applications on its blockchain using JavaScript. This initiative aims to increase accessibility and reduce barriers for developers worldwide. By offering full JavaScript support, Tezos hopes to attract more developers to its platform. This move is expected to open up opportunities for millions of developers globally.
news.headline: Tezos releases Jstz, offering full JavaScript integration to developers, making blockchain accessible to millions worldwide.

news.summary: Explore the possibilities of utilizing handwritten PTX code to improve GPU performance within CUDA applications, as highlighted by industry experts at NVIDIA. This method could lead to significant enhancements in computational speed and efficiency. Further details on this topic can be found by following the provided link.
news.headline: Discover how handwritten PTX code can boost GPU performance in CUDA apps, per NVIDIA; learn more to explore this potential.

news.summary: With interest rates fluctuating, investors are turning to floating rate notes (FRNs) and collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) for income generation and minimizing rate risk. These investment options have gained popularity due to their ability to provide attractive returns in a volatile market. Both FRNs and CLOs offer variable interest rates, making them less susceptible to interest rate changes compared to fixed-rate options. Investors are increasingly considering these alternatives as they navigate the uncertainties of the current economic climate.
news.headline: Floating rate instruments like FRNs and CLOs are becoming popular amidst economic uncertainty, offering income with reduced rate risk.

news.summary: In Bilbao, Spain, H2SITE has received the EIC Accelerator program for their innovative project that involves setting up an unprecedented ammonia cracking unit. This unit is designed to generate 1 ton of high-purity hydrogen daily. The technology behind the system relies on H2SITE’s unique palladium-based membrane reactor technology. This technology allows for the concurrent catalytic breakdown of ammonia and selective extraction of hydrogen within one unit. This advancement presents several benefits and promises a significant impact.
news.headline: H2SITE receives EIC Accelerator funding for a 1 TPD ammonia cracker at a North-West Europe port. 1 ton of hydrogen daily.
Sampo plc reports BlackRock, Inc.'s stake above 10% as per Securities Market Act - Chapter 9, Section 10.

news.summary: In Gothenburg, Sweden, on July 3, 2025, SKF has partnered with Proteus Marine Renewables to provide advanced technology for the MeyGen project. Run by SAE Renewables, this tidal stream array in Scotland's Pentland Firth is the largest of its kind globally. SKF has revealed a significant collaboration aimed at enhancing the array's operations.
news.headline: Renewable energy market to receive boost with SKF's tidal stream breakthrough in Scotland's MeyGen with Proteus Marine Renewables.
Sweden Swedbank/Silf PMI Services June: 54.6 (prev 50.8; prevR 50.9) - Swedbank/Silf PMI Composite: 51.5 (prev 50.3; prevR 50.4)

news.summary: In Hong Kong, 3i has revealed exclusive Prime Day discounts on its leading robot vacuum and mop models, including the 3i S10 Ultra, 3i P10 Ultra, and the latest addition, the 3i G10+. These deals will be available from July 8 to July 11, offering significant savings for customers.
news.headline: 3i offers Prime Day sale on robot vacuums like 3i S10 Ultra, P10 Ultra, and new G10+.Dates: July 8-11.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that a record number of 15,000 new cases of COVID-19 have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of active cases in the country to over 100,000. Additionally, the death toll has reached 500, with 20 new fatalities recorded today. Authorities are urging the public to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Hexagon Purus ASA invites stakeholders to the Q2 2025 results presentation. Mark your calendars now!

news.summary: In Skinnskatteberg, Sweden, on July 3, 2025, the Board of Directors of Systemair AB announced the appointment of Robert Larsson as the new President and CEO. He will succeed Roland Kasper, who held the position since 2015. Larsson, who has been with the company since 2018, has been assigned various roles within the organization.
news.headline: Robert Larsson appointed as President and CEO of Systemair AB, replacing Roland Kasper who held the position since 2015.

news.summary: Former General Manager of the Bank for International Settlements, Agustín Carstens, and the Chairman of Bajaj Finserv, Sanjiv Bajaj, have recently been added to the board of the Global Finance & Technology Network (GFTN). The announcement was made on July 3, 2025, in Singapore. This move signifies a strengthening of the leadership team within GFTN. Additionally, Her Majesty Queen is also set to join the board. This development showcases the organization's commitment to enhancing its governance structure and leveraging the expertise of influential figures in the finance and technology sectors. The inclusion of Carstens and Bajaj brings a wealth of experience to the board, contributing to GFTN's strategic decision-making process.
news.headline: Queen Máxima of the Netherlands to chair Global Finance & Technology Network's International Advisory Board, along with Agustín Carstens and Sanjiv Bajaj joining.

news.summary: Zak Cole, a key Ethereum developer, has recently established the Ethereum Community Foundation to address areas left untouched by the official Ethereum Foundation. Cole aims to fill the existing gaps and support initiatives that the Ethereum Foundation may not be prioritizing. This initiative is set to bring about positive changes within the Ethereum community, with a focus on enhancing the overall ecosystem.
news.headline: New Ethereum Community Foundation led by Zak Cole aims to address gaps with a $10K ETH focus.

news.summary: According to a financial industry association, they are recommending that tokenized stock offerings should not be granted an exemption by the Securities and Exchange Commission. Instead, they suggest that these offerings should undergo the "notice and comment process."
news.headline: Finance trade group advises SEC against special treatment for tokenized stocks, suggesting they undergo normal notice and comment process.

news.summary: A new malware has been identified that can circumvent Apple's memory protections. This malware is designed to deploy an infostealer payload, specifically targeting cryptocurrency wallets. This poses a significant threat to users as it can potentially compromise sensitive information and access valuable assets. Users should remain vigilant and ensure their devices are secure to prevent falling victim to this attack.
news.headline: North Korean hackers use unique Mac exploit to target crypto projects, bypassing Apple's protections. Malware steals from crypto wallets.

news.summary: In a statement to the media, President Marc Grens of DigitalMint revealed that an employee at the company is currently under investigation and has subsequently been terminated.
news.headline: Investigation underway of negotiator for allegedly accepting crypto ransom money; firm President confirmed, employee terminated.

news.summary: In June 2025, AS Tallink Grupp saw a 4.9% growth in passenger numbers, with a total of 598,977 passengers transported, surpassing the figures from June 2024. However, the number of cargo units experienced an 11.2% decline, totaling 22,544 units. On the other hand, there was a 1.0% increase in the number of passenger vehicles, reaching 87,530 units compared to the previous year.
news.headline: June 2025: Tallink Grupp transported 598,977 passengers, a 4.9% increase YoY. Cargo units down 11.2%, passenger vehicles up 1.0%.

news.summary: In the fourth quarter, Bang & Olufsen saw a 4% rise in revenue, reaching DKK 2.6bn for the year with a slight decrease of 1% in local currencies. Gross margin was at a peak of 55.8% for Q4 and settled at 55.0% by year-end. The EBIT margin pre-special items was 1.0% for the full year, accompanied by free cash flow of DKK 16m. These outcomes were consistent with forecasts and matched the annual projections.
news.headline: Bang & Olufsen's 2024/25 report shows record-high gross margin of 55.0%, DKK 2.6bn revenue, and 1.0% EBIT margin.

news.summary: An innovative genomics applications company, Volta Labs, Inc., has revealed their plans to extend their commercial footprint in Europe by setting up their Callisto Sample Prep System™ at the Norwegian Sequencing Centre (NSC) in Oslo. This move, announced on July 3, 2025, signifies a significant step for the company in further penetrating the European market. This development showcases their commitment to advancing genomics technology in the region, leveraging the advanced capabilities of NSC in Oslo. This strategic installation is expected to boost research capabilities and enhance genomic sequencing processes at the centre, aligning with Volta Labs' mission to drive innovation in the genomics sector.
news.headline: Volta Labs places Callisto Sample Prep System at Norway's NSC in Oslo, expanding presence in Europe.

news.summary: In June 2025, AS Tallink Grupp saw a 4.9% rise in the number of passengers transported, reaching 598,977 individuals compared to June 2024. The cargo units experienced an 11.2% decline, totaling 22,544 units. Conversely, the number of passenger vehicles increased by 1.0%, reaching 87,530 units compared to the previous year.
news.headline: Tallink Grupp transported 598,977 passengers in June 2025, up by 4.9% from June 2024. Cargo units decreased by 11.2% to 22,544 units. Passenger vehicles increased to 87,530 units, up by 1.0% from last year.

news.summary: EDF has reported the successful issuance of its senior multi-tranche bonds totaling ¥75.8 billion in nominal value.
news.headline: EDF successfully issues multi-tranche bonds totaling ¥75.8 billion, securing a substantial amount for its financial needs.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was indicated that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5% in the United States, signaling positive growth in the labor market. Additionally, the economy added a noteworthy 250,000 jobs in the last month, exceeding expectations and reflecting strong hiring activities across various sectors. The decrease in unemployment coupled with the substantial job gains is seen as a promising development for the national economy. This data suggests increased stability and opportunities for individuals seeking employment in the country.
news.headline: Company buys back 5,000 of its own shares for $50,000, taking advantage of current market conditions.

news.summary: Record numbers of tourists visited the country last year, with a total of over 10 million visitors, marking a 20% increase from the previous year. The tourism industry contributed significantly to the economy, generating over $15 billion in revenue. This growth has led to the creation of over 50,000 jobs in the hospitality and service sectors. The government has announced plans to further invest in tourism infrastructure to accommodate the increasing number of tourists expected in the coming years.
news.headline: Planisware speeds up growth in Asia, reveals new office opening in Seoul. #expansion #Asia #Seoul

news.summary: During the Annual General Meeting of Fingerprint Cards AB (publ) on June 24, 2025, a decision was made to conduct a reverse share split. This process will consolidate every 2,000 existing shares into a single new share, reflecting a reverse split ratio of 1:2,000. Additionally, the AGM approved the Board of Directors to set the record date for the reverse split.
news.headline: Fingerprint Cards AB (publ) to carry out 1:2,000 reverse share split with record date to be determined by Board of Directors.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global renewable energy capacity hit a record high in 2020, reaching 2,799 gigawatts. This marks a 10.3% increase from the previous year, with the majority of the growth coming from solar and wind power. Solar capacity saw a 127 gigawatt increase, while wind power capacity increased by 111 gigawatts. The renewable energy sector also attracted investments totaling $303.5 billion in 2020, showcasing a strong commitment towards sustainable energy sources. These developments indicate a positive trend towards a greener and more sustainable future.
news.headline: Walker Lane Resources Ltd. gets good results from aerial surveys and Coeur's mapping on Silverknife Property, BC. Clarification on recent Nevada deals underway.
Stolt-Nielsen Limited releases Q2 and H1 2025 unaudited results.
RUSSIA (JUN) S&P GLOBAL RUSSIA COMPOSITE PMI ACTUAL: 48.5 VS 51.4 PREVIOUS

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Madrid, it was revealed that the global company MelBet has forged a collaboration with Andrés Iniesta, a renowned midfielder in the world of football. Iniesta, a Barcelona icon, World Cup victor, and two-time European champion, is set to work closely with MelBet. This partnership aims to leverage Iniesta's expertise in the industry and his standing as a football legend.
news.headline: MelBet partners with Andrés Iniesta as ambassador of fair play. Legendary footballer joins international company.

news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 5.2%, an increase from last month's 4.8%. This has resulted in a total of 1.3 million individuals currently unemployed. Additionally, the GDP growth for the last quarter was recorded at 2.5%, marking a slight decrease from the previous quarter's 2.8%. These economic indicators suggest a challenging scenario for the country's economy in the upcoming months.
news.headline: Bitcoin's price could reach $116,000 next month due to favorable macroeconomic factors.
